outlook_paragraph: Continental Resources shows 14 active drilling sites as of early February 2024, with a relative activity delta of -50% compared to recent trends, indicating a notable pullback in operational momentum. Only 2 newly active sites suggest limited expansion, while the majority of activity remains on continuously active pads. With WTI averaging near $77.85 and a realized price differential of 78%, revenue is further tempered by a segment fraction of just 40%, implying less than half of operations are in the highest-performing areas. These factors converge in a deterministic revenue forecast of approximately $1.51B for Q4 2023.
